notes: Backtest/Replay parity fix: OB/FVG multi-candidate tie-break now always picks newest first (matches live unconditionally, was gated behind a dead flag). Trailing candle-mode bar size now derived from zone_timeframe instead of hardcoded M5. No effect on default config (M5, trailing off) - verified identical trade-by-trade output before/after on a real backtest month.
